scripts.test:scroll: rm -rf /tmp/session-insight-scroll-sync && tsc src/scrollSync.ts --outDir /tmp/session-insight-scroll-sync --module ES2020 --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck && cp /tmp/session-insight-scroll-sync/scrollSync.js /tmp/session-insight-scrollSync.mjs && node scripts/test-scroll-sync.mjs
scripts.test:terminal-interactions: rm -rf /tmp/session-insight-terminal-interactions && tsc src/terminalInteractionGeometry.ts --outDir /tmp/session-insight-terminal-interactions --module ES2020 --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck && cp /tmp/session-insight-terminal-interactions/terminalInteractionGeometry.js /tmp/session-insight-terminalInteractionGeometry.mjs && node scripts/test-terminal-interactions.mjs
scripts.test:minimap: rm -rf /tmp/session-insight-minimap-geometry /tmp/session-insight-minimap-semantics && tsc src/minimapGeometry.ts --outDir /tmp/session-insight-minimap-geometry --module ES2020 --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck && cp /tmp/session-insight-minimap-geometry/minimapGeometry.js /tmp/session-insight-minimapGeometry.mjs && node scripts/test-minimap-geometry.mjs && tsc src/minimapSemantics.ts src/types.ts --outDir /tmp/session-insight-minimap-semantics --module ES2020 --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck && node scripts/test-minimap-semantics.mjs
scripts.test:sidebar: rm -rf /tmp/session-insight-sidebar-rows && tsc src/sidebarRows.ts src/types.ts --outDir /tmp/session-insight-sidebar-rows --module ES2020 --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck && cp /tmp/session-insight-sidebar-rows/sidebarRows.js /tmp/session-insight-sidebarRows.mjs && node scripts/test-sidebar-rows.mjs
scripts.test:bookmarks: rm -rf /tmp/session-insight-bookmark-state && tsc src/bookmarkState.ts src/types.ts --outDir /tmp/session-insight-bookmark-state --module ES2020 --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck && node scripts/test-bookmark-state.mjs
scripts.test:folds: rm -rf /tmp/session-insight-terminal-folds && tsc src/terminalFolds.ts src/types.ts --outDir /tmp/session-insight-terminal-folds --module ES2020 --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck && node scripts/test-terminal-folds.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:scroll && npm run test:terminal-interactions && npm run test:minimap && npm run test:sidebar && npm run test:bookmarks && npm run test:folds
scripts.go:build: npm run build && cd .. && go build -tags sqlite_fts5 -o session-insight .
